candidate: Raise retained MTP draft vocab cap from 32768 to 65536

workload.suite: llama.cpp mtp-bench prompt suite, raw prompt render

commands.cap65536_quicksort_smoke: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=65536 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-vocab65536-current-quicksort-smoke-20260612.json
commands.cap65536_suite: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=65536 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-vocab65536-current-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-vocab65536-current-9prompt-d32.json
commands.cap32768_control_suite: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 10800 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3,5 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-b5-current-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b3-b5-current-9prompt-d32.json

cap_block_census.method: Conservative first-rejected-target-token census reconstructed from exact B=3 suite ar_tokens, accepted_lengths, and active_budgets. Counts only cycles where accepted < active_budget and the first rejected target token is outside the given cap.

decision_reason: The 32768 cap produced a nontrivial first-rejected-token out-of-cap rate, and the cap65536 A/B converts enough of that into accepted tokens to outweigh the larger proposer LM-head cost on the 9-prompt D32 suite. Although wall increases by 0.596 ms/cycle, visible density rises by 0.163 tokens/cycle and the exact-suite ratio improves from 0.926x to 0.967x. Promote cap65536 as the retained MTP operating point; full-vocab remains an open diagnostic because cap65536 still has out-of-cap first rejections but may be too expensive.
